experience.description: Developed a machine translation system using LSTM with Bahdanau attention, processing over 250,000 English-Vietnamese sentence pairs and optimizing translation quality with BLEU score evaluation.

Built a medical chatbot using Transformer and GPT architectures with PyTorch, fine-tuned with Reinforcement Learning (PPO, DPO), and achieved high accuracy in heart disease detection using TensorFlow and EDA.

Created a custom dataset for NLP fake news classification, implementing traditional ML algorithms (Naive Bayes, Logistic Regression, Decision Tree) and deep learning with Doc2Vec, comparing approaches for optimal text classification.
Developed a real-time face recognition system using OpenCV and deep learning face embeddings, including dataset construction, face encoding, and recognition on static images and live video streams.
